---
# =============================================================================
# projects/index.qmd — Projects listing page
# =============================================================================
#
# HOW TO EDIT THIS PAGE
# ---------------------
# • The listing automatically discovers every .qmd file in this folder's
#   sub-directories and renders them as cards.
# • To add a new project, create a new folder under projects/ and add an
#   index.qmd following the pattern in projects/sample-project/index.qmd.
# • Each sub-project page should link back to this site's home page.
#
# HOW SUB-ORGANISATION REPOSITORIES CONTRIBUTE PAGES
# ---------------------------------------------------
# Projects in other `julesg-org` repositories can contribute pages here in
# two ways:
#
#   Option A — Copy content (simple):
#     Copy the project's README or documentation into a .qmd file here.
#     Keep it updated manually or via a scheduled GitHub Actions workflow.
#
#   Option B — Git submodule (advanced):
#     Add the other repo as a Git submodule under projects/<repo-name>/.
#     The CI workflow already handles `git submodule update --init --recursive`
#     so submodule content is pulled automatically on each build.
#
# See .github/workflows/deploy.yml for the CI configuration.
#
# =============================================================================
title: "Projects"
description: >
  Open-source projects and tools from the Jules G Org organisation.
  Each project lives in its own GitHub repository; this page aggregates them.
listing:
  contents:
    - "*/index.qmd"           # pick up the index.qmd in each sub-folder
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---
